style_effects: Glowing crimson energy auras pulse gently around bulbasaur's limbs, casting long, slow-motion trails of crystalline frost patterns that refract light into prismatic shards. A deep indigo aura surrounds its body in swirling, geometric waves, radiating cold blue-white light that illuminates the surrounding air with shimmering metallic reflections. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
